key_insights.insight: It's crucial to exercise your inner demons rather than suppressing them, because suppressed negativity can engulf and control you.
key_insights.quote: The moment you lock them away the moment you lock these thoughts away the moment you lock these demons away the moment you lock any negativity away all it's going to do is take over like a mold. And it's going to completely engulf you.

key_insights.insight: Facing your inner self and being honest is the most courageous and liberating thing you can do.
key_insights.quote: But when you decide to step into the arena, when you decide to step into that and go, right, I'm going to face this and put thatmirror on yourself, ultimately facing yourself, that is the hardest but most liberating thing I've ever done.

key_insights.insight: Constantly challenge yourself to turn negatives into positives, because without negativity, positivity wouldn't exist.
key_insights.quote: Without negativity you wouldn't have positivity it wouldn't exist it doesn't you know it's the polar opposite so people say but so i challenge negativity i love negativity because i will challenge it and challenge it and challenge it

key_insights.insight: Embracing change is essential for growth and aligns with how the world evolves.
key_insights.quote: We should be constantly changing. We should be constantly evolving. We should be constantly moving forward.

key_insights.insight: It's crucial to separate positivity and happiness, acknowledging that you can be positive without always being happy, and that true happiness stems from knowing yourself.
key_insights.quote: So don't get don't get positivity mixed up with happiness. Yeah, because they're two completely different things. And happiness comes from, yeah, in knowing who you are, you know, it comes from from being true to you are knowing who you are.

key_insights.insight: When faced with adversity, having a strong foundation of self-knowledge and truth allows you to build back up, even if everything is stripped away.
key_insights.quote: but when you're honest with yourself and you know who you are those foundations are solid you will always have something to build from

key_insights.insight: By embracing failure, you can learn and grow from every experience.
key_insights.quote: I love it when negativity comes along and failure comes along you know i'm so intrigued on what i'll get out of it i'm so intrigued what ilearned from it because when you learn you grow when you grow you become a better version of who you are

actionable_advice.how_to: Find safe environments (like with trusted friends) to express your thoughts and feelings, or put yourself in challenging physical situations to test your limits.

actionable_advice.advice: Challenge negativity and look for the seed of positivity within.
actionable_advice.how_to: When faced with a negative situation, don't run from it. Dive into the center of it, challenge each thought, and look for the light of positivity. Then grow that seed of positivity.
Regularly assess if your actions and beliefs align with your true self and not the expectations of others, like on a weekly or monthly basis.

memorable_stories: Ant's experience sitting on the job center steps after leaving the military and realizing he was living a lie.
Ant describing his time in the French Foreign Legion and how his perspective changed.
Ant's story about finding himself playing barbies with his one-year-old daughter after returning home from Afghanistan.
contrarian_claims: Bravery isn't necessarily about being fearless, it's about stepping into the arena and facing yourself.
Adrenaline is not the drug of living on the line of life and death, it's actually ultimate peace.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Ant Middleton Opens Up About His Personal Demons, Being "Cancelled" & His Spirituality
